title: Now Hiring Store Manager at MedPlus

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at MedPlus
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Store Manager with drive and ambition, MedPlus in Mysuru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About MedPlus:
MedPlus is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP Retail

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MedPlus!
